carriedBehavior: model-facing agent spawn, wait, close, send, follow-up, and list tools
thread-tree registration and parent/child routing through the AgenC thread manager
mailbox delivery for agent-to-agent messages without terminal pane orchestration
background task lifecycle output for spawned agents
intentionalReductions: tmux and iTerm pane orchestration are not carried because AgenC's live multi-agent surface is the thread/mailbox runtime, not a visible teammate-pane product
in-process teammate runner state is not duplicated because AgenC agent execution already runs through delegate(), ThreadManager, and run-agent lifecycle code
team files, hidden-pane state, and teammate permission sync are not carried until a user-visible teams surface exists

carriedBehavior: configured command hook discovery, ordering, matcher evaluation, subprocess execution, timeouts, aborts, diagnostics, and structured output parsing
PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, PermissionRequest, UserPromptSubmit, Stop, StopFailure, PreCompact, PostCompact, and SessionStart event adapters
secret redaction for command diagnostics and hook-returned user/model-facing strings
intentionalReductions: prompt, HTTP, and agent hook transports from the TypeScript runtime are not carried because AgenC exposes command hooks as the live extension mechanism
file-change and cwd-change hook watchers are not carried because AgenC has no live environment-file hook surface
skill-improvement and frontmatter hook registration are owned by AgenC skills and prompt assembly rows rather than the hook engine
network SSRF policy is not folded into the hook engine; network-facing tools and provider adapters own their endpoint guards

carriedBehavior: secret redaction for logs, transcripts, hook output, and trace payloads
local auth state is written atomically with 0600 file mode
remote auth tokens are resolved through explicit bootstrap env/file paths
intentionalReductions: macOS Keychain, Linux Secret Service, Windows DPAPI, and keychain prefetch are not carried until AgenC has a managed credential store surface
LocalAuthBackend's UUID token is a local identity marker and cannot vend provider credentials
BYOK provider keys remain outside managed auth and flow through explicit provider configuration

carriedBehavior: rollout-backed resume into the live session state
root and child thread registration during bootstrap
initial resume history recording with prior token and tool state
synthesized recovery events for orphaned rollout turns
intentionalReductions: arbitrary transcript-file resume, legacy attachment migration, and skill-state restoration are not duplicated because AgenC resumes from its rollout/state stores
interrupted prompt auto-continue sentinels are not carried into bootstrap; turn recovery is owned by state replay and tool recovery categories
TypeScript runtime transcript-size caps are not copied because AgenC's resume path reconstructs from indexed rollout items rather than a single pre-REPL message payload
